Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.cime

Interface CiMeChatEventListener

public interface CiMeChatEventListener
Listener for CiMe chat events.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(CiMeChat chat)
    Called when the live broadcast ends.
    default void
    onChat(CiMeChatMessage msg)
    Called when a regular chat message is received.
    default void
    onConnect(CiMeChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called when the chat client connects.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when the chat connection closes.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an error occurs.
    default void
    onEvent(String eventName, String rawJson)
    Called when a non-chat system event is received.
    default void
    onSubscription(CiMeSubscriptionMessage msg)
    Called when a subscription event is received.
    default void
    onSubscriptionGift(CiMeSubscriptionGiftMessage msg)
    Called when a gifted subscription event is received.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(CiMeChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called when the chat client connects.
      Parameters:
      chat - connected chat instance
      isReconnecting - whether this connection is from a reconnect attempt

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when the chat connection closes.
      Parameters:
      code - close status code
      reason - close reason
      remote - whether closure was initiated remotely
      tryingToReconnect - whether a reconnect attempt will follow

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(CiMeChat chat)
      Called when the live broadcast ends.
      Parameters:
      chat - chat instance for the ended broadcast

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an error occurs.
      Parameters:
      ex - exception raised by the client

    • onChat

      default void onChat(CiMeChatMessage msg)
      Called when a regular chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - received chat message

    • onSubscription

      default void onSubscription(CiMeSubscriptionMessage msg)
      Called when a subscription event is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - parsed subscription payload

    • onSubscriptionGift

      default void onSubscriptionGift(CiMeSubscriptionGiftMessage msg)
      Called when a gifted subscription event is received.
      Parameters:
      msg - parsed gifted subscription payload

    • onEvent

      default void onEvent(String eventName, String rawJson)
      Called when a non-chat system event is received.
      Parameters:
      eventName - event name
      rawJson - raw JSON payload
